title: MISO LMP Day Ahead Hourly Ex Post JSON API
description:
Day-ahead, hourly, Ex-Post, LMPs publishing by MISO prior to the operating day. Ex-Post LMPs are published in the late afternoon or early evening of the day prior to the market day, several hours after the Ex-Ante day-ahead LMPs.

See MISO's *BPM 002 - Energy and Operating Reserves* for additional discussion.
